bugs_found: approve_plan endpoint returns success without updating DB when no manager_agent available (plan stays proposed)
ManagerChat optimistic message added AFTER API call completes (defeats purpose of optimistic UI)
store upsertPlan crashes when plan_data is undefined (plan_completed WS event has no plan_data)
plan_completed/plan_updated WS handler passes raw payload as Plan (payload has plan_id not id, no plan_data)
PlanSummary type missing from types.ts (used in api.ts and WorkItemsList.tsx)
ManagerChat thinking status immediately reset in finally block (should persist until manager response arrives)
bugs_fixed: approve_plan endpoint now calls db.approve_plan() before attempting agent execution
ManagerChat adds optimistic message immediately before API call, removes on error
store upsertPlan guards against missing plan_data with null check and merges with existing
plan_completed/plan_updated WS handler correctly resolves plan by plan_id and updates status
ManagerChat thinking status only reset on error, persists until manager response arrives
